_comment: Map from Omniscience origin icon library (public/icons/svg/{color,mono}/<id>.svg) to semantic lesson names. Generated by a vision classification pass 2026-06-03; 3 unrecognizable icons dropped (sheet1_r5c1, sheet2_r0c0, sheet2_r0c5). Consumed by scripts/import-origin-icons.mjs. Palette is byte-identical to theme.ts, so color SVGs are on-palette as-is.

dropped.reason: ambiguous hoop/ring on a base — reads as a generic loop
abstract dots on a card — no recognizable subject
abstract color-pill strip — reads as a legend, not an object
